name: sidebutton-mcp-claude-code
title: SideButton MCP + Claude Code (no Chrome extension)
description: Same as the default variant but skips the Chrome managed-policy block that force-installs the SideButton extension and skips the browser_connected handshake wait. Chrome still boots — without the extension. Useful for benchmarking Claude Code native tools against the SideButton browser bridge and for fleets that don't need an in-browser bridge.
